overall.description: First-person perspective walking down a dimly lit art deco corridor with distinctive green atmospheric lighting. The camera moves steadily forward past a vintage movie poster toward a set of large wooden double doors at the end of the hall. Cinematic game engine footage with a moody, atmospheric horror or stealth aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: art deco corridor with vintage movie poster

events.description: passing the large vintage movie poster on the right wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the corridor, approaching and passing a vintage movie poster mounted on the right wall

entered.detail: large framed poster with text 'IN BETWEEN WITH MR. DO' and portrait, mounted on the right wall
dark metal trash receptacle on the floor beneath the poster
ornate wall-mounted light fixture with greenish glow beside the poster
large dark wooden double doors with brass handles at the end of the corridor
dark red carpet runner extending down the center of the corridor over checkered tiles

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow art deco corridor with distinctive green atmospheric lighting. The camera moves forward past a large vintage movie poster on the right wall featuring 'IN BETWEEN WITH MR. DO', along with a trash can and ornate wall sconces. The checkered floor pattern and red carpet runner lead the eye toward distant double doors at the end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching the end of the corridor with double doors

events.description: final approach to the double doors as they fill the frame

agents.ego_description: continuing forward down the corridor, steadily approaching the large wooden double doors at the end of the hall

entered.detail: twin vertical brass handles on the double doors becoming visible in close-up

segments.scene_description: Having passed the poster, the camera continues down the corridor with the double doors growing progressively larger in the frame. The wall sconces slide past on either side as the camera approaches the wooden doors, ending with a close-up view of the brass door handles. The green atmospheric lighting and checkered floor pattern remain consistent throughout the approach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a moody art deco corridor that culminates in a close-up of a set of imposing double doors. It begins by gliding past a large vintage movie poster for 'IN BETWEEN WITH MR. DO' and a trash can, with ornate wall sconces casting a distinctive green atmospheric glow over a checkered floor and red carpet runner. As the camera advances, the surrounding architectural details slide past on either side, causing the distant wooden doors to grow progressively larger in the frame. The scene then narrows its focus as the camera approaches the end of the hall, finally settling on a detailed view of the brass door handles.
